title: Thailand Vehicle Registration Application Form (แบบคำขอจดทะเบียนรถ, ขส.บ. 10)
description: The Department of Land Transport's (DLT) "แบบคำขอจดทะเบียนรถ" (Vehicle Registration Application Form, internal code ขส.บ. 10 / "khor sor bor 10"), the form an applicant files at a provincial or Bangkok DLT office to register a vehicle in Thailand's vehicle registry — either a genuinely new vehicle, or an existing registered vehicle undergoing a change of registration type/characteristic (e.g. a vehicle-class change) under a new plate. Opens Thailand's DMV vertical (4 of 6); Thailand's other open verticals are Taxes, Business Formation, and Visa. The live source is a flat, non-AcroForm, 2-page printable PDF with real vector text (not scanned). Page 1 is the applicant-facing request: the applicant's own particulars (name, age, nationality, a Thai-style address broken into house number/moo/soi/road/tambon/amphoe/changwat, phone), the registration-type choice (new vehicle vs. type/characteristic change, the latter carrying an existing plate number), the vehicle being registered (type, chassis number, engine type/number, intended-use purpose), a checklist of supporting evidence that may accompany the request, and the applicant's own signature/certification to comply with road-use law. Page 2 is a vehicle-inspection record completed by DLT inspection staff (weight, engine specifications, lighting, brakes, tires, emissions, and roughly two dozen further inspection checkpoints), not an applicant input, and is out of scope for this v1.0.0 — see VERIFICATION.md for the full scoping rationale, including the one applicant-facing acknowledgment signature line that does appear on page 2. The bottom portion of page 1 (fee computation, registrar/clerk review steps, and issuance of the new registration number) is likewise DLT-staff-completed and out of scope. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Thailand or the Department of Land Transport.

source.documentRef: ขส.บ. 10 (khor sor bor 10), "แบบคำขอจดทะเบียนรถ" (Vehicle Registration Application Form), 2-page PDF titled "AW_กรมการขนส่ง_01 แบบคำขอจดทะเบียนรถ_rev1"; the DLT's own e-form portal (dlt.go.th) could not be reached this cycle (TLS/network error) so this third-party document-mirror copy is cited as the primary source, cross-verified byte-for-byte against a 2025-09-17 Wayback Machine snapshot of the same URL and corroborated as the current official form by a DLT provincial-office citizen-service manual (see VERIFICATION.md).

verification.notes: GOV-2637, GovSchema Standard Research cycle. Opens Thailand's DMV vertical (4 of 6); Thailand previously stood at 3/6 (Taxes, Business Formation, Visa). Independently re-fetched https://www.sc-broker.com/attachments/view/?attach_id=330468 this cycle: an initial attempt returned an HTTP 404 HTML error page (not a PDF); three subsequent retries all returned HTTP 200 with a real PDF, sha256 0b73ac4ad06c9430dd46ece1cf0863b7127ff5f62a08bf7516fcba548d5f4d55, byte-identical to a Wayback Machine snapshot of the same URL taken 2025-09-17 (also sha256 0b73ac4a...). Treating the transient 404 as a one-off availability blip rather than the source being dead, since three independent retries plus the archived snapshot all agree exactly. dlt.go.th itself was unreachable this cycle (curl exit 35, SSL connect error), consistent with a prior cycle's note; it remains the preferred canonical source if it becomes reachable in a future review. Extracted full text from both pages with pdfjs-dist (legacy build, getTextContent()) in a scratch directory (not a repo dependency): page 1, 3339 characters, confirmed a 2-page real-vector-text (non-scanned) form matching the task's own field description (applicant particulars, address components, registration-type choice with plate-number carryover for a type/characteristic change, vehicle identification fields, a supporting-evidence checklist, applicant signature/certification, and a DLT-staff-only fee/review/issuance block); page 2, 3628 characters, confirmed an inspection-record layout (weight, engine specs in cc/kW, lighting, brakes, tires, emissions in dB(A)/CO%/HC ppm, and a numbered 1-27 checkpoint grid) completed by inspection staff ("ผู้ตรวจ"/"ผู้วินิจฉัยผล"), with exactly one applicant-facing line — an acknowledgment-of-inspection-result signature ("ได้รับทราบผลการตรวจสภาพแล้ว ลงชื่อ...ผู้ยื่นคำขอ") — not modeled in this v1.0.0 (see scoping notes below). Corroborated the form's current official status via a second, independently-fetched source: a Chaiyaphum provincial DLT office's citizen-service manual (คู่มือสำหรับประชาชน: การจดทะเบียนรถ), https://www.chaiyaphumdlt.go.th/fileupload/611792.pdf (HTTP 200, real PDF text, sha256 11d27992812879c548e7e6dca5a7fab8504a16caa9e339953b63acdb2adb7bbb), whose page 4 'แบบฟอร์ม ตัวอย่างและคู่มือการกรอก' (Forms, samples, and filling guide) section lists 'แบบคำขอจดทะเบียนรถ' as the office's own official vehicle-registration form, and whose page 3 supporting-documents table independently confirms a national-ID-card requirement conditioned on the vehicle owner appearing in person (a fact used only as corroboration, not copied into this document's own field-level requiredness, since it is a secondary/generic source rather than the ขส.บ. 10 form's own text — see VERIFICATION.md). Scoped to page 1's applicant-facing content covering both the new-vehicle and type/characteristic-change registration pathways; page 2 (the inspection record) and the DLT-staff-only fee/review/issuance portion of page 1 are out of scope, disclosed in full in VERIFICATION.md alongside every other judgment call (vehicleType/engineType modeled as free-text fields rather than invented enums, since the source presents them as blank fill-ins not checkboxes; the supporting-evidence checklist modeled as documents[] entries left unconditionally optional, since the source's own checklist does not tie any item to a specific registrationType value).

fields.name: applicantFullName
fields.label: Applicant's full name
fields.sourceRef: Page 1: "เรียน นายทะเบียน ข้าพเจ้า....................................................." ("To the Registrar, I, [applicant name] ...")

fields.name: addressHouseNumber
fields.label: House number (บ้านเลขที่)

fields.name: addressMoo
fields.label: Village number (หมู่ที่)
fields.description: Common for rural addresses; not every address has a village number, so left optional.

fields.name: addressTambon
fields.label: Sub-district (ตำบล / แขวง)

fields.name: addressAmphoe
fields.label: District (อำเภอ / เขต)

fields.name: registrationType
fields.label: Requested registration action
fields.description: Whether this request is to register a genuinely new vehicle, or to register a change of an existing vehicle's registered type or characteristic (which carries the existing plate number forward, see existingPlateNumber).
fields.sourceRef: Page 1: "มีความประสงค์ขอจดทะเบียน   รถใหม่   รถเปลี่ยนประเภทหรือลักษณะคันหมายเลขทะเบียน................................" ("I wish to register: [ ] a new vehicle [ ] a vehicle change of type or characteristic, plate number ...")

fields.name: existingPlateNumber
fields.label: Existing registered plate number
fields.description: Only applicable when this request is a type/characteristic change to an already-registered vehicle, not a new-vehicle registration.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1: "รถเปลี่ยนประเภทหรือลักษณะคันหมายเลขทะเบียน................................"

fields.name: vehicleType
fields.label: Vehicle type (ชนิดรถ)
fields.description: Modeled as free text rather than an enum: the source presents this as a blank fill-in line, not a checkbox group, so no enum of values is directly evidenced by the form's own text.

fields.name: chassisNumber
fields.label: Chassis/vehicle identification number (เลขตัวรถ)

fields.name: engineType
fields.label: Engine type (ชนิดเครื่องยนต์)
fields.description: Modeled as free text; the source presents this as a blank fill-in line, not a checkbox group.

fields.name: engineNumber
fields.label: Engine number (เลขเครื่องยนต์)

fields.name: vehicleUsagePurpose
fields.label: Intended vehicle-use purpose (เพื่อใช้เป็นประเภทรถ)

fields.name: otherEvidenceDescription
fields.label: Description of other supporting evidence attached (อื่นๆ)
fields.description: Free-text description accompanying the checklist's 'other' item, when checked.

fields.name: otherEvidenceAttached
fields.label: Other supporting evidence attached (อื่นๆ)
fields.description: Checklist item for evidence not covered by the other named checklist categories; when true, otherEvidenceDescription should describe it.

documents.label: Hire-purchase contract (หนังสือสัญญาเช่าซื้อ)
documents.sourceRef: Page 1 checklist, "หลักฐานประกอบคำขอ ดังนี้": "หนังสือสัญญาเช่าซื้อ"

documents.label: Notice of sale (หนังสือแจ้งจำหน่าย)
documents.sourceRef: Page 1 checklist: "หนังสือแจ้งจำหน่าย"

documents.label: Payment receipt (ใบเสร็จรับเงิน)
documents.sourceRef: Page 1 checklist: "ใบเสร็จรับเงิน"

documents.label: Power of attorney (หนังสือมอบอำนาจ), when a representative files on the owner's behalf
documents.sourceRef: Page 1 checklist: "หนังสือมอบอำนาจ"

documents.label: National ID card, or a photocopy of it (บัตรประจำตัวประชาชน หรือภาพถ่ายบัตรประจำตัวประชาชน)
documents.sourceRef: Page 1 checklist: "บัตรประจำตัวประชาชน" / "...หรือภาพถ่ายบัตรประจำตัวประชาชน". Left unconditionally optional in this v1.0.0: a corroborating DLT provincial-office manual notes this document is required specifically when the vehicle owner appears in person (as opposed to via a representative under powerOfAttorney), but ขส.บ. 10 itself does not encode that conditionality as a distinct field this document could gate on, so the condition is disclosed in VERIFICATION.md rather than invented here.

documents.label: Company registration certificate of the buyer or hire-purchaser (หนังสือรับรองการจดทะเบียนนิติบุคคลของผู้ซื้อหรือผู้เช่าซื้อ)
documents.sourceRef: Page 1 checklist: "หนังสือรับรองการจดทะเบียนนิติบุคคลของผู้ซื้อหรือผู้เช่าซื้อ". Applicable only when the buyer or hire-purchaser is a registered juristic entity rather than a natural person.

documents.label: Applicant's signature
documents.statement: ขอรับรองว่าจะปฏิบัติตามกฎหมายที่เกี่ยวข้องกับการใช้ทาง การจราจร ค่าผ่านทาง ค่าปรับและค่าธรรมเนียมต่างๆ ที่เกิดขึ้นจากการใช้รถของตนเอง หรือให้บุคคลอื่นใช้รถ ("I certify that I will comply with the laws related to road use, traffic, tolls, fines, and fees arising from the use of my own vehicle, or from allowing another person to use the vehicle.")
